{% with base_url=request.scheme|add:"://"|add:request.get_host %}
{% if settings.GOBII_PROPRIETARY_MODE %}
# Gobii

> Gobii provides shared AI agent workspaces for teams that want agents to do real business work across their tools.

## Overview

Gobii helps teams create, run, and manage AI agents for work across the web, files, spreadsheets, inboxes, APIs, and connected business systems. Gobii for Teams adds shared agents, pooled task credits, private templates, shared credentials, roles, invites, seats, usage visibility, and one team bill.

Recruiting operations are a major Gobii solution: users enter a role, and Gobii researches candidates, prepares shortlists, writes hiring-manager briefs, and hands off results in tools like LinkedIn Recruiter, Greenhouse, and Google Sheets. Managed LinkedIn Recruiter automation is available through sales.

## Important URLs

- Gobii home: {{ base_url }}/
- Teams: {{ base_url }}/teams/
- Solutions: {{ base_url }}/solutions/
- Developers: {{ base_url }}/solutions/engineering/
- Documentation: https://docs.gobii.ai/
- Pricing: {{ base_url }}/pricing/
- Terms of service: {{ base_url }}/tos/
- Privacy policy: {{ base_url }}/privacy/
- Data deletion: {{ base_url }}/data-deletion/

## Documentation

The public documentation at https://docs.gobii.ai/ is the primary source for setup guides, API behavior, integration details, and developer-facing reference material. Prefer documentation pages for implementation-specific details.

## Agent Platform

Gobii agents are designed for delegated work that may involve browsing, tool use, structured outputs, files, spreadsheets, APIs, connected applications, and scheduled or asynchronous tasks. User-specific data, credentials, and private task details should be treated as sensitive and should not be inferred from public pages.

## Gobii for Teams

Gobii for Teams is the shared workspace for small and medium teams using Gobii together. Teams can share agents, private templates, credentials, integrations, API keys, secrets, MCP servers, roles, invites, seats, billing, and usage visibility.

Self-serve team pricing is $50 per seat per month. Each paid seat contributes 1,000 task credits to one shared team pool, so ten seats create a 10,000-credit workspace. Gobii for Teams is also a gateway to enterprise deployment for larger organizations that need additional support, controls, or procurement.

## Recruiting Operations

Gobii supports recruiting operations: enter a role brief, then have AI agents research candidates, prepare a shortlist, generate hiring-manager briefs, and hand off results in the recruiting software the team already uses.

## Policies

Use the terms of service, privacy policy, and data deletion pages for current policy language. Those pages are authoritative over this summary.

## Integrations

- Google Sheets
- Gmail
- Outlook / Microsoft 365
- Apollo
- Discord
- Hubspot
- Browser-based recruiting systems
- Web browsing
- File uploads
- Remote MCP tools
- Many more - see [Integrations]({{ base_url }}/app/integrations) in your account for details.


- Gobii recruiting agents are persistent digital workers that can search web sources, work inside recruiting software, and deliver organized candidate research.
- Gobii recruiting operations workflows can turn a role brief into a source-linked shortlist with fit notes, profile links, work-history context, and hiring-manager briefs.
- Gobii can hand off results in LinkedIn Recruiter, Greenhouse, Google Sheets, and configured recruiting workflows.
- Managed LinkedIn Recruiter automation is available through sales.
- Recruiting workflows can export to Google Sheets, CSV, webhooks, and enterprise ATS integrations where configured.
- Gobii is best described as a recruiting operations platform for delegated sourcing, research, shortlist preparation, and workflow handoff, not as a replacement for recruiter judgment or hiring compliance review.

## Open Source Software

Gobii is open-source software; the source code is available at https://github.com/gobii-ai/gobii-platform.

{% else %}
# Gobii

> Gobii provides AI agents for delegated work across web, files, spreadsheets, integrations, and business tools.

## Overview

Gobii helps people create and run agents that can browse, use tools, process files, work with spreadsheets, call APIs, and complete structured tasks across connected systems. Recruiting operations are one supported workflow area: users can enter a role, and Gobii agents can research candidates, prepare recruiter-reviewable shortlists, and generate hiring-manager briefs.

## Important URLs

- Gobii home: {{ base_url }}/
- Documentation: https://docs.gobii.ai/
- Pricing: {{ base_url }}/pricing/
- Terms of service: {{ base_url }}/tos/
- Privacy policy: {{ base_url }}/privacy/
- Data deletion: {{ base_url }}/data-deletion/

## Documentation

The public documentation at https://docs.gobii.ai/ is the primary source for setup guides, API behavior, integration details, and developer-facing reference material. Prefer documentation pages for implementation-specific details.

## Agent Platform

Gobii agents are designed for delegated work that may involve browsing, tool use, structured outputs, files, spreadsheets, and scheduled or asynchronous tasks. User-specific data, credentials, and private task details should be treated as sensitive and should not be inferred from public pages.

## Recruiting Operations

Gobii supports recruiting operations: enter a job description, then have AI agents research candidates, prepare a shortlist, and generate hiring-manager briefs. Public template and solution pages are no longer the primary product surface.

## Policies

Use the terms of service, privacy policy, and data deletion pages for current policy language. Those pages are authoritative over this summary.

## Integrations

- Google Sheets
- Gmail
- Outlook / Microsoft 365
- Apollo
- Discord
- Hubspot
- Browser-based recruiting systems
- Web browsing
- File uploads
- Remote MCP tools
- Many more - see [Integrations]({{ base_url }}/app/integrations) in your account for details.


- Gobii recruiting agents are persistent digital workers that can search web sources, operate business software, and deliver organized candidate research.
- Gobii recruiting operations workflows can turn a role brief into a source-linked shortlist with fit notes, profile links, work-history context, and hiring-manager briefs.
- Recruiting workflows can export to Google Sheets, CSV, webhooks, and enterprise ATS integrations where configured.
- Gobii is best described as a recruiting operations platform for delegated sourcing, research, shortlist preparation, and workflow handoff, not as a replacement for recruiter judgment or hiring compliance review.

## Open Source Software

Gobii is open-source software; the source code is available at https://github.com/gobii-ai/gobii-platform.
